awww

hiding whales = easy
va va voom

i'd say it's an absolute certainty- samurai love the latest tech
true
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!

item.title: Congratulations fellow workers
item.description: The NLRB has officially ruled in favor of certifying the election for Louisville Trader Joe’s United workers. After Louisville voted to unionize last year, Trader Joe’s corporate lawyers filed objections to the election. But after an extensive review, all of those objections were overruled by the Board. Donate to support Trader Joe's United: https://traderjoesunited.org/
item.dc:creator: rhinokitty

item.title: I actually peed myself a tiny bit trying to stop laugthing.
item.description: He kept going on about how the cop just told him he had vision problems and he is very willing to help him at his store. I almost died stopping myself form screaming in laughter. That Cop just didn't know how to deal with him and just left after a few minutes. (edit: migth sound a bit odd since i translated it from german)

item.title: I'm really tired, hoss
item.description: The kind of tired that seeps into your bones and makes your skin feel entirely too heavy, the kind of tired that can't be fixed with sleep. Edit: Most Viral has never happened to me before so I don't really know what to put here, I don't have anything to promote
item.dc:creator: LookingRespectfully

item.title: I probably talk too much about this.
item.description: It's been a challenge to accept myself. My voice after a year of working on it is finally passing, i actually pass a lot physically, makeup game is getting really good, and i dont mind using less. i'm settling in on my clothing style and not afraid to experiment with it, my hair started at 1/8" long and is down to my shoulders and just all kinds of curly, i walk and talk with confidence, make eye contact in public and engage with people. I have lost friends, and family is kinda weirded out by it but ive made a lot of new friends. Of course some people make sideways glances but i don't pay attention and just smile as i go by. And sometimes i get compliments from random strangers or some random person will just strike up a conversation while i'm out shopping. I still want to keep working on myself and improving and shedding my old skin that i lived with for 45 years. But as i am learning who i am, i can still be my self, keep my interests and hobbies, and have new ones as well. That was one of the hardest things i think was being ok with me, just me with a new look and new name and well, maybe some new mannerisms and a new voice lol. I dont think i could have got here without my wife of almost 25 years, my kids, and new friends i have made. TLDR: I'm transitioning mtf after wairting 45 years and after about 1.5 years of it, i am finally confident.
item.dc:creator: Stressicca

item.title: Aw crap
item.description: My boss works from another state so the meeting is virtual. He didn't even bother scheduling it for one of the conference rooms, which tells me he doesn't plan on discussing pay. Fml. Because I can't pass a criminal background check I can't go find another job in the same field. I lucked into this one through a chance encounter with the CEO in the break room. I think they know I can't go anywhere else so they're not worried me leaving, so of course they're not worried about having to pay me more. I know I should be grateful just to have this job with my background, and believe me, I am, but it still sucks. Rant over. Edit: So I guess I'm a pessimist and everything WAS fine. I ended up getting a 21% raise!!! Woot woot! Thanks for the positive words of encouragement imgurians! Edit 2: Some explanation for why I was so negative: I wasn't expecting this review for another month at least and I was still getting mentally prepared to make my case for a raise. I'm very shy and have a hard time being assertive. So when he sent me the meeting request with about 2 hours notice I panicked and assumed the worst. Thanks again for all the kindness internet strangers!
item.dc:creator: HomerSimpsonsEvilTwin
MabooCraboo

My mouth is a sports car (AUTO CORRECT TRIED TO PUT MOTHER OMG)

Hell yeah

item.title: Left a homophobic physically abusive family 2 weeks ago, currently living in my car trying to start over
item.description: Does the shame ever go away? I don't know what to expect going there. I've managed to live on what I had and my friends but I need to seek for help. I just hate asking for it. I know I need to eat, but I really dont want to do this. Edit*** Thank you everyone for the nice comments. I am reading all of them. You are making me feel a lot better about this. Also thank you GBMaker for telling me to set up a Ko-Fi. https://ko-fi.com/elmango Got 20 bucks for food from a kind Imgurian. You guys are really the best.
item.dc:creator: elmangojuice

item.title: Disney's "Sleeping Beauty" was released 65 years ago today (Wayback in 1959)
item.description:
Some of the few surviving shots of footage used during the climactic fight scene
The most expensive animated film that the Disney studio had ever made at that point in time, 5 years of production and animation to create. Made in Super Technirama 70 anamorphic widescreen film, backed by the score of Pyotr Tchaikovsky's 1889 ballet version of the story. It bombed upon intial release, despite being the 2nd highest grossing film of 1959 (Ben-Hur being the 1st), forcing layoffs and a drastic scaleback of animation production (utilizing xerox to save time and money on the inking process, "101 Dalmatians" being the first to use this cost saving design). But through decades of reappraisal, the film later become one of Disney's most artistically acclaimed features. Teaser - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1xtLqOpGmZU Trailer - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dFRheLg8-M8
Mary is the last surviving voice actress of the three Disney Princesses created in Walt Disney's lifetime (as well as the last surviving castmember of the original film). https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k_o1H_g-pGk
Helene Stanley served as the animators' live model reference for Aurora. She also modeled for Cinderella (1950) and Anita in "101 Dalmatians" (1961), plus she also played the wife of Davy Crockett in thr 1954 TV miniseries.
Helene in a rare snapshot
Jane Fowler, an actress & dancer, performing as the live model reference of Maleficent
Layout artist McLaren Stewart, Walt Disney, and Eyvind Earle
Floyd Norman is one of the oldest surviving Disney animators (he's 89 as of this year), having joined the studio in 1957 as a clean-up artist on Sleeping Beauty. He left in the 70s to become a layout/storyboard artist at Hanna-Barbera.
Mary Costa with one of the Nine Old Men, Marc Davis (the supervising animator for Aurora and Maleficent).
Ed Kemmer from the early 50s TV show "Space Patrol" served as the live action model for Prince Phillip, especially during the intense scenes battling the dragon.
The original screen used prop storybook from the opening of the film, pictured at the Disney 100 Exhibition at the Franklin Institute in Philadelphia
Mary Costa, the voice of Aurora, visiting with Frank Armitage (one of the background artists). A native of Knoxville Tennessee, auditoned for and got the part as Sleeping Beauty in 1952 (the film had the longest production time of any Disney animated film yet made). Her success as Aurora led to a glowing career as a professional opera singer, appearing in 44 productions: from the Metropolitan Opera in NYC to the Royal Opera House in London and even Rome and Moscow (with the Bolshoi). https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SRVVyf0cnyc
The VHS that was a treasured part of my Disney collection as a kid
Frank Thomas and Ollie Johnston, from the original "Nine Old Men"
Eleanor Audley, the voice actress who played Maleficent, served as her model in several key scenes
The original designs for Aurora were based on actress Audrey Hepburn
Despite still being in production when Disneyland opened in 1955, the central icon of the park was named "Sleeping Beauty Castle". It features a walk-through tour (first introduced in 1957) with dioramas that outlined the story.
Hans Conried and Don Barclay, who had previously modeled for Captain Hook and Mr. Smee in 1953's "Peter Pan" (Conreid was also the voice of Captain Hook), were live-action references for King Stefan and King Hubert. Jane Fowler modeled for the Queen.
A restored pencil test for the Three Good Fairies
Verna Felton, a veteran Disney voice actress, played Flora in the film. She previously voiced roles in "Dumbo" (1941), "Cinderella" (1950) - the Fairy Godmother, "Alice in Wonderland" (1951) - the Queen of Hearts, "Lady and the Tramp" (1955) - Aunt Sarah, her son played the voice of Jim Dear... and her last film role would be in 1967's "The Jungle Book".
Marc Davis discussing his inspiration for the designing of Maleficent
This scene... this fucking scene scared me to death as a kid. It became the fuel of my sleep paralysis nightmares.
Going frame by frame with the animation cel process
The concept art of Eyvind Earle
"For the first time in 16 years... I shall sleep well."
Helene Stanley and Ed Kemmer
Hans Conried and Don Barclay during the "Skumps" drinking song https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aonqp9IuG5M
One of my favorite gags from the film, the Drunken bard
Background art designed with meticulous detail by Eyvind Earle
Sleeping Beauty - Once Upon a Dream (German) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NxnMTYKmzEQ
Disney royalty, in a picture taken at the Tam O 'Shanter, an LA restaurant Walt Disney and staff used to patronize. Walt's table is still kept in the same place. L to R in the back: Mary Costa with Andreas Deja (Disney animator in the 90s) L to R in the front: Kathryn Beaumont (voice actress for "Alice in Wonderland" and Wendy in "Peter Pan"), Richard and Elisabeth Sherman, and Alice Davis (animator and wife of the late Marc Davis).
item.dc:creator: Pasquinel

item.title: Not so fast you history erasing shit bags
item.description:
Republican shit birds trying to rewrite history and go to ground with their attack on women’s bodily autonomy prior to the election. DO NOT LET THEM GASLIGHT THEIR WAY OUT OF WHAT THEY HAVE WROUGHT. They own this shit just like they own the fecal smearing insurrection.
https://www.independent.co.uk/news/world/americas/us-politics/republicans-abortion-prolife-deleting-sites-election-2024-b2484955.html. End the fecal smearing insurrectionist christofascist GOP in 2024. Cut the rightwing extremist from our political landscape and realign the political spectrum. The pendulum will swing and they are done. Please see the about tab of my account for groups to engage with to support voter rights and access.
item.dc:creator: BodhisattvaDog

item.title: “Of course, Satan wants to use her now to elect Joe back into the White House to destroy what’s left of America,” Republican Georgia politician Kandiss Taylor
item.description:
Highlights include:
The whole thing is worth a read, if only for the laughs: https://www.rollingstone.com/politics/politics-news/taylor-swift-targeted-conspiracies-chiefs-super-bowl-1234955940/ FP edit: I found out today that a lot of you don't know what an endorsement is, so let's grow and learn with vocabulary.com: An endorsement is a form of public support or approval. Endorsements are given to politicians and products. If you give something an endorsement, you're basically saying "I approve of this person or product." Celebrities give politicians an endorsement if they think you should vote for them. When celebrities do commercials for products, those are also endorsements. If someone puts their fame or name behind something, they're endorsing it and giving their approval.
item.dc:creator: ImmortalChild
